user.title: Set up Schluter DITRA-HEAT
user.description: Enter your schluterditraheat.com credentials to connect your thermostats to Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Schluter DITRA-HEAT
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your password to re-authenticate.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Schluter service. Please check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email address or password. Please try again.
error.rate_limit: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error.session_limit: Too many active Schluter sessions. Please log out of the Schluter app or web portal and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This account is already configured in Home Assistant.
